name: token-swap-card
title: Token Swap Card
author: Parable
description: A demo-grade crypto swap card with two token fields (searchable keyboard-driven picker + amount input) whose amounts derive from the USD price ratio, a center button that flips 180° and swaps the sides on a spring, a live rate line, and a Swap button that runs an inline pending → done animation. The flip, card cross, and spinner drop to instant state swaps under prefers-reduced-motion.
